public_reduced_install_boundary: flywheel-autoloop remains a full-substrate local surface, not a public reduced-install binary.
changes: widened run/scan eligibility from ok/ready only to ok, ready, warn, fail, and interrupt when next_owner is agent and override is clear
added deterministic run selection priority: fail=100, interrupt=90, warn=70, ready=50, ok=50 before dirty-count tiebreaks
mapped doctor payload docs_state=drift_detected as well as repo_docs_state=drift_detected to flywheel-lock-repair --scope locks --apply
replaced raw doctor_failed exit path with diagnose, repair, strict-doctor retry, and repair_failed/repair_not_available negative-cache outcomes
replaced raw tick_failed exit path with diagnose, local repair, tick retry, and tick_repair_failed negative-cache outcome

acceptance_gates.proof: run dry-run prioritizes fail repair candidate before ready work
doctor drift repair invokes lock repair, retries doctor, and avoids raw doctor_failed cache
successful repair fixture retries doctor and writes no raw doctor_failed cache
failed doctor repair caches repair_not_available or repair_failed, never raw doctor_failed

acceptance_gates.command: shellcheck tests/flywheel-autoloop-canonical-cli.sh && git diff --check && br dep cycles

socraticode_query: flywheel-autoloop diagnose and repair doctor failure negative cache fixtures tests convergence autoloop zbs8
